function solve(nums) {
    const N = nums.length;
    if (N < 3) {
        return 0;
    }

    // Calculate Cost A (Peaks at 1, 3, 5, ...)
    let costA = 0;
    for (let i = 1; i <= N - 2; i += 2) {
        const L = nums[i - 1];

        const requiredValue = Math.max(L, R) + 1;
        
        // Calculate increase needed for nums[i]
        const increase = Math.max(0, requiredValue - nums[i]);
        costA += increase;
    }

    // Calculate Cost B (Peaks at 2, 4, 6, ...)
    let costB = 0;
    for (let i = 2; i <= N - 2; i += 2) {
        const L = nums[i - 1];
        const R = nums[i + 1];
        const requiredValue = Math.max(L, R) + 1;
        
        // Calculate increase needed for nums[i]
        const increase = Math.max(0, requiredValue - nums[i]);
        costB += increase;
    }

    // The maximum number of peaks is achieved by either I_A or I_B (or both if N is small/even).
    // We choose the configuration that results in the minimum cost.
    return Math.min(costA, costB);
}
